emails.subject: Re: Trading Track Meeting, Tuesday, November 28, 2000
emails.body: Re: Trading Track Meeting, Tuesday, November 28, 2000 I have this on my calendar. I have jury duty on Tuesday starting at 8:00 am. I hope to make that short and sweet and be back here as soon as I can. So I should be able to make the meeting at 4:00. I will call you if I get hung up at the court house. --Sally Enron North America Corp. From: John J Lavorato 11/27/2000 02:00 PM Sent by: Kimberly Hillis

emails.subject: Trading Track Meeting, Tuesday, November 28, 2000
emails.body: Trading Track Meeting, Tuesday, November 28, 2000 A meeting is scheduled for tomorrow, Tuesday, November 28, 2000 with regard to the new Trading Track program. The meeting will be held in 49C1 from 4:00 5:00 p.m. If you have a conflict, please contact Kim Hillis at x30681.
